caption: AI gives answers. Decision Trace preserves why.
narration: AI can give us an answer in seconds. LiveNode Decision Trace preserves why a decision was made.

caption: Paste one meeting transcript — up to 30,000 characters
narration: I paste one fictional meeting transcript. The public demo accepts up to thirty thousand characters.

caption: A low-cost model detects grounded decision topics
narration: A low-cost model detects two decision topics and grounds each topic in exact transcript segments.

caption: Human review comes before generation
narration: Before generation, the user can review, rename, select, or exclude each topic.

caption: Generate traceable reasoning, not only a summary
narration: Each selected topic becomes a Decision Trace: situation, assumptions, criteria, trade-offs, recommendation, and next actions.

caption: Input evidence and AI inference stay visibly separate
narration: Grounded evidence stays separate from AI inference, so a polished answer cannot silently become a supplied fact.

caption: Download a portable Markdown ZIP
narration: The browser creates a Markdown ZIP with a meeting summary, actions, Decision Traces, and reusable KX Notes.

caption: Built with Codex and GPT-5.6
narration: Codex built the demo. GPT-5.6 structures each reviewed decision.
